ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot checking a clock, implying the time is ten-thirty.  The robot will use its right arm to mimic the action of looking at a clock. The left arm will remain in a neutral position for balance. The animation will consist of four frames. Frame one: The right arm starts in a relaxed position at the side. Frame two: The right arm extends forward towards the clock, with the wrist slightly angled upward to simulate pointing or looking at a clock face. Frame three: The right arm is slightly bent at the shoulder, as if the robot is leaning in to get a better look. Frame four: The right arm returns to its original relaxed position.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, calm and neutral
right arm extends forward, checking the time
leaning in for a closer look at the clock
right arm returns to rest, time noted
